name: Demo page — SiteAssistant widget answers a real question via the gateway

planSteps.description: Click the floating circular chat launcher button in the bottom-right corner (aria-label 'Open chat')
The chat panel opens showing the assistant name 'ChatDock Assistant' and the greeting 'Questions about ChatDock?'
Type 'What is ChatDock in one sentence?' into the input with placeholder 'Type a message…' and press Enter
Within 30 seconds, an assistant reply bubble appears containing the word 'ChatDock' — a real streamed model response, not an error message and not the text 'Connection failed'
